summary: Iteration 8 - Platform Sync API Integration Testing. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified Test and Sync buttons visible for connected syncable platforms (Google, Facebook). YouTube and Reddit show Connect buttons as expected (not connected).

feature_verification.sync_test_google_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/sync/test/google returns graceful 'not_connected' when no OAuth token
feature_verification.sync_test_facebook_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/sync/test/facebook returns graceful 'not_connected' when no OAuth token
feature_verification.sync_test_youtube_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/sync/test/youtube returns graceful 'not_connected' when no OAuth token
feature_verification.sync_test_reddit_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/sync/test/reddit returns graceful 'not_connected' when no OAuth token
feature_verification.sync_sync_google_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/sync/sync/google triggers sync (returns in_progress or error)
feature_verification.sync_status_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/sync/status returns platform connections list
feature_verification.scheduler_15_minute_interval: PASS - scheduler.py contains auto_sync_platforms with IntervalTrigger(minutes=15)
feature_verification.test_button_google_visible: PASS - Test button visible for connected Google platform
feature_verification.test_button_facebook_visible: PASS - Test button visible for connected Facebook platform
feature_verification.sync_button_google_visible: PASS - Sync button visible for connected Google platform
feature_verification.sync_button_facebook_visible: PASS - Sync button visible for connected Facebook platform
feature_verification.test_button_youtube_not_visible: PASS - Test button NOT visible for YouTube (not connected)
feature_verification.test_button_reddit_not_visible: PASS - Test button NOT visible for Reddit (not connected)
feature_verification.sync_facebook_toast_message: PASS - Clicking Sync shows 'Sync started for Facebook' toast
feature_verification.test_google_connection_issue: PASS - Clicking Test shows 'Connection Issue' (graceful fallback, no OAuth token)
feature_verification.graceful_fallback_behavior: PASS - All test endpoints return 'not_connected' status when no access token stored

critical_code_review_comments: Google, Facebook, YouTube, Reddit API service classes fully implemented with test_connection, get_*, reply_* methods
Sync routes properly check for access tokens and return 'not_connected' gracefully when missing
Frontend correctly shows Test/Sync buttons only for SYNCABLE_PLATFORMS (google, facebook, youtube, reddit) when connected
Auto-sync scheduler configured with 15-minute interval via APScheduler IntervalTrigger
All API endpoints protected with authentication (returns 403 without token)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Test/Sync buttons verified, toast messages working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing client connection data

mocked_apis_list: Platform API calls require real OAuth tokens to succeed - currently no real tokens stored
Google Business Profile API, Facebook Graph API, YouTube Data API v3, Reddit API calls implemented but return errors/not_connected without real OAuth authorization

context_for_next_testing_agent: All sync functionality tested: 1) GET /api/sync/test/{platform} endpoints for google/facebook/youtube/reddit return 'not_connected' gracefully, 2) POST /api/sync/sync/{platform} triggers background sync, 3) GET /api/sync/status returns connected platforms, 4) Frontend Test/Sync buttons visible only for connected syncable platforms (google, facebook currently connected, youtube/reddit not connected), 5) Scheduler auto_sync_platforms runs every 15 minutes. Note: Real API integrations require valid OAuth tokens - current behavior shows graceful 'not_connected' fallback.
